What suppliers are we using for nick cave event?
generated_sql: SELECT p.company_name FROM assignments a JOIN providers p ON a.provider_id = p.id JOIN events e ON a.event_id = e.id WHERE e.name ILIKE '%nick cave%' LIMIT 50

query_text: How many events do we have scheduled for July 2026?
generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events e WHERE e.date >= '2026-07-01' AND e.date < '2026-08-01' LIMIT 50

query_text: How many events do we have scheduled for July 2026? and what are they?

query_text: how man times do we have lewis capladi?
generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM staff_details sd JOIN assignments a ON sd.assignment_id = a.id JOIN providers p ON a.provider_id = p.id WHERE sd.staff_name ILIKE '%lewis capaldi%' LIMIT 50

query_text: how man times do we have lewis Capaldi?
generated_sql: SELECT e.name, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM assignments a JOIN events e ON a.event_id = e.id JOIN staff_details sd ON sd.assignment_id = a.id WHERE sd.staff_name ILIKE '%lewis capaldi%' GROUP BY e.name LIMIT 50
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events e WHERE e.name ILIKE '%lewis capaldi%' LIMIT 50

query_text: whats the value of the outstanding payments?
generated_sql: SELECT a.id, a.status, a.assigned_managers, a.assigned_supervisors, a.assigned_sia, a.assigned_stewards FROM assignments a WHERE a.status = 'outstanding' LIMIT 50
